name: onmyagent-server
description: Filesystem-backed API for OnMyAgent remote clients

scripts.test:archive: bun test tests/agentsview-archive.test.ts tests/agentsview-archive-routes.test.ts tests/agentsview-archive-sync.test.ts tests/agentsview-parser.test.ts
scripts.test:routes: bun test tests/workspace-session-routes.test.ts e2e/env-routes.e2e.test.ts e2e/mcp.remote-connect.e2e.test.ts e2e/reload-events.e2e.test.ts e2e/session-read-model.e2e.test.ts e2e/workspace-activate.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:workspace: bun test tests/workspace-init.test.ts tests/workspace-import-preview.test.ts tests/workspace-export-safety.test.ts tests/portable-files.test.ts tests/portable-opencode.test.ts tests/blueprint-sessions.test.ts e2e/artifact-files.e2e.test.ts
scripts.build:bin:all: bun ./script/build.ts --outdir dist/bin --target bun-darwin-arm64 --target bun-darwin-x64 --target bun-linux-x64 --target bun-linux-arm64 --target bun-windows-x64
